race.comment: Former Victorian DREAMWRITER (4) went down by a narrow margin when having her first outing for the new stable and will have come on with the run now under the belt. Should find this assignment easier than what she faced down south and can go one better against this line-up. IL FRATELLO (1) looked handy saluting at Beaudesert on debut before being tipped out for further time to furnish. Tuned up for this with a recent trial placing and can go back-to-back to start the career. HEROIC DELANEYS (5) is yet to miss the top-five in all six career efforts to date and will be ready to peak now third-up from the spell. A must for the exotics players. SHE'S BRUTAL (8) gets 2kg weight relief from the low draw and may earn some minor money. The well-related ZARIPPA (3) (half to 2xG3 winner I'm A Rippa) best of the rest.
